creator: petef@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The freetype dependency is already there: 

entropy(/usr/ports/graphics/gd) [175] > make build-depends-list | grep freetype 
/usr/ports/print/freetype2 
entropy(/usr/ports/graphics/gd) [176] > 

Please try building the port again and make sure your freetype port is up 
to date.  Thanks!
